Ventilation info unavailable: The ventilation recommendation is not available yet because absolute humidity has not been calculated.
Outdoor ventilation reference: Outdoor reference: Absolute humidity is {absoluteHumidity} g/m³. This value is used for indoor ventilation recommendations.
Indoor ventilation info without outdoor: Indoor: Absolute humidity is {absoluteHumidity} g/m³. Mark one device as outdoors to receive a ventilation recommendation.
Ventilation recommended because indoor i: Ventilation could be useful: Indoor absolute humidity is {absoluteHumidity} g/m³, outdoor is {outdoorAbsoluteHumidity} g/m³. Indoor air is {difference} g/m³ more humid.
Ventilation not recommended because indo: Ventilation may be less useful right now: Indoor absolute humidity is {absoluteHumidity} g/m³, outdoor is {outdoorAbsoluteHumidity} g/m³. Indoor absolute humidity is not higher.
